The real problem

Your Weight Is a Symptom. These Are the Actual Problems.

Most coaches chase the number on the scale. We fix the lifestyle diseases driving it — because that's the only way the weight stays off.

😴

Chronic Fatigue

Root cause: cortisol dysregulation + mitochondrial stress

You wake up tired, hit 3 PM and collapse. Chai and coffee mask it temporarily. Your cells are producing less ATP than they should — a direct consequence of poor sleep architecture and chronic stress.

YPT90 fix: Energy reset protocol through meal timing + cortisol management
🌙

Poor Sleep

Root cause: elevated cortisol + blood sugar spikes at night

You fall asleep fine but wake at 2–3 AM wired. Or you sleep 7 hours and still feel wrecked. Disrupted sleep spikes the hunger hormone by 24% and tanks fat-burning by over half. No diet fixes this.

YPT90 fix: Sleep architecture upgrade using science, not melatonin gummies
🫃

Gut Issues & Bloating

Root cause: dysbiosis + inflammatory diet + chronic stress

Constant bloating, post-meal discomfort, irregular digestion. A compromised gut wall lets inflammatory proteins into the bloodstream — triggering systemic inflammation that makes fat loss nearly impossible.

YPT90 fix: Gut repair and anti-inflammatory nutrition protocol
🩺

High BP, Cholesterol & Blood Sugar

Root cause: insulin resistance + visceral fat + sedentary lifestyle

Your doctor says "watch your diet." You try. Numbers barely move. The fix isn't fewer rotis — it's addressing insulin sensitivity, visceral fat, and vascular inflammation at the same time.

YPT90 fix: Blood marker tracking + biomarker-based nutrition

Sound familiar?

You Manage Everything Except Your Body

You know what to do. You just never have time, energy, or a system that fits your actual life.

😮‍💨

The Energy Lie

You live on chai and coffee to survive the day. Your kids have more energy than you at 8 PM — and that stings.

🔄

The Restart Loop

You go hard for two weeks, then work travel kills the momentum. You restart from zero. Every. Single. Month.

📱

The Information Trap

You've tried keto, IF, and HIIT reels. Nothing sticks because nothing was designed for your actual schedule.

🪞

The Mirror Problem

You've told yourself "this is just age." But deep down you know this isn't who you are — you just don't have the right system.

The YPT90 System

3 Phases. 90 Days. Built Around Your Reality.

Most coaches give you a PDF and say good luck. This is a system engineered around your schedule, your stress, and your family life.

🧭
Phase 0

Baseline & Audit

Foundation — Week 0
  • Deep lifestyle, sleep & stress audit
  • Blood report analysis & hormonal baseline
  • Goal-setting with measurable metrics
  • Personalized protocol built around your schedule
Outcome: You know exactly what's wrong and exactly what to fix.
🔥
Phase 1

Reset

Weeks 1–4
  • Gut repair & inflammation reduction
  • Blood sugar stabilization through meal timing
  • Energy reset without eliminating the foods you love
  • Sleep quality upgrade using science, not supplements
Outcome: Consistent energy all day. No crash. No chai dependency.
⚡
Phase 2

Rebuild

Weeks 5–10
  • Targeted fat loss with preserved muscle
  • Hormone optimization for parents 30–55
  • Progressive workouts designed for 30–45 min windows
  • Cortisol & stress management protocols
Outcome: 8–15 kg down. Body composition visibly changed. Clothes fitting again.
🚀
Phase 3

Own It

Weeks 11–13
  • Long-term maintenance system built into your routine
  • Social eating guide — weddings, dinners, travel
  • Freedom from tracking, counting, and obsessing
  • Identity shift: health as default, not discipline
Outcome: You sustain results without trying. This becomes who you are.

What's included

Everything Built For You. Nothing Generic.

📞

Weekly Strategy Calls

1-on-1 every week. We adjust the plan around your travel, stress, and schedule — not the other way around.

🧬

Blood Report Analysis

We track biomarkers, not just the scale. Testosterone, thyroid, insulin resistance — things your gym trainer never checks.

🥗

Custom Diet Plan

A fully personalized plan built on Indian food and your family's meals. No boiled chicken. No salads at every meal.

💊

Supplement Protocol

Only what's proven and necessary. A branded PDF covering what, when, and why — referenced to your blood work.

💬

WhatsApp Support

Direct access to your coach. Not a group. Not an intern. Real-time support when you're traveling or when you slip.

📊

Progress Tracking

A structured check-in process that keeps you honest without becoming another thing on your to-do list.
